title: Common Chart Types for Graphical Abstracts: Bar, Pie, and Line Charts

L2: Common chart types (bar, pie, line) that convey high-level information with few data points
Appropriate data encoding for graphical abstracts
L3: Figure 3 from the Ten Simple Rules paper showing common chart types suitable for graphical abstracts: bar charts, pie charts, and line charts. Emphasizes that these should convey high-level information with few data points, appropriate for the summary nature of graphical abstracts. CC BY 4.0.
